title: Hiring Production Engineer at Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises!
